hfcd6e12eg45fag4385gad35geaf4f7619885: It'll take a while for us all to recover, but you've helped us take the first step.
hf455c214gfa9bg4c14gb0fdgb0feacabd08c: So it's true. You scattered the goblins. Peace can finally return to this corner of the Sword Coast. Thank you.
hef2dc139ge5b6g4b12g8210g43e5a41ba976: By the trees, I never liked the ritual, but when I saw that drow, I admit I wished we'd finished it.
h5d61af87gf7f1g4835gaf95g36aa891b1383: I don't know what we would have done without you.
h653ab227gc909g4d27gbbbbgb4d2d971e5b0: By the trees! I don't know what I dreaded more - the goblins, or being stuck here with Kagha for the rest of my days.
hbcc51f92g9a55g4cc8g9499ga2395b70fa8f: But you've solved both those problems in one go.
h5d312577gba06g4f9egbd43g04f520157c3c: I'm just glad I could help.
hee17bc50g7e29g4c9dgac6dgc559695d97ae: As am I. And I'm sure those poor refugees would quite agree.
h659001b9g450cg4091ga522ga0d593f74671: Any excuse to gut some goblins.
h81bc63faga85cg408dg9b88g7e29214de032: I want to trade, if you have anything good.
